title: Count the Signs
prompt: Turn ciphertext symbols into observed frequencies before guessing meaning.

title: Structure Leaks
prompt: Ask what statistical or linguistic structure survives the cipher transformation.

title: Hypothesize, Test, Revise
prompt: Treat each substitution as a candidate mapping that must be tested against language.

title: Bound the Method
prompt: Use classical cryptanalysis examples for history and education, not unauthorized access.
